title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.13.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rollup | devDependencies | minor | [`1.12.3` -> `1.13.1`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/rollup/1.12.3/1.13.1) | [source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.13.1`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1131)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.13.0...v1.13.1)

_2019-06-01_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Avoid conflicts between top-level module, require etc. and CommonJS runtimes ([#​2889](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2889))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2888](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2888): Enable full TypeScript strict mode ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2889](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2889): Protect all module globals for CJS output from being redefined ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.13.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1130)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.12.5...v1.13.0)

_2019-05-31_

##### Features

-   Omit `exports` and `module` from SystemJS wrapper if possible ([#​2880](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2880))
-   Try to use the first letters of names when mangling exports ([#​2885](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2885))

##### Bug Fixes

-   Avoid conflicts with local variables when using format specific globals to render dynamic imports and file URLs ([#​2880](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2880))
-   Do not produce undefined reexports when reexporting from entry points ([#​2885](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2885))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2880](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2880): Deconflict global variables used inside format-specific code ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2885](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2885): Do not produce undefined reexports when reexporting from entry points and refactor chunk linking ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.12.5`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1125)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.12.4...v1.12.5)

_2019-05-30_

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2884](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2884): Update pluginutils for new micormatch and reduced bundle size ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.12.4`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1124)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.12.3...v1.12.4)

_2019-05-27_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Show correct error stack trace for errors throw in "load" hooks ([#​2871](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2871))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2875](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2875): Mention subfolders in docs ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2871](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2871): Reserve error stack information ([@​LongTengDao](https://togithub.com/LongTengDao))

</details>
